title: miles's Enchanted Tools
description: This texture pack give mineral or gem trims for tools enchantments. It's basically Visual Enchantments but thematic.
body:
[![Alt text](https://imgur.com/zGKJhtN.png)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/milesdemillas/projects)

<center>

Greetings, This texture pack give mineral or gem trims for **tools** enchantments. It's basically Visual Enchantments but thematic.  
### This texture pack requires **[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)** or **[CIT Resewn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn)**.  
And make sure your configs are set corretly:  
Option/Video Setting/Quality/Custom Item: **ON**  
**Works on 1.20 and below versions.**
 
**Designs for Axes**  
![Alt text](https://imgur.com/KQZT35h.png)

</center> 

<details>
<summary>How does it work</summary>

Place the enchantment of the trim that you like the most in the first position.  
**Like this**  
![Alt text](https://imgur.com/KmtmrVx.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Themes</summary>

**Enchantment themes**  
Quartz theme is for Sharpness (axe)  
Giled theme is for Smite (axe)  
Spider eye theme is for Bane of Arthropods, like his eyes (axe)  
Emerald theme is for Fortune  
Crying Obsidian theme is for Silk Touch  
Copper theme is for Efficiency **(special mechanics, look at the end of the post)**  
Green exp theme is for Mending  
Echo Shards theme is for Unbreaking  

</details>

<center>

**Designs for Pickaxes, Shovels, Hoes**  
![Alt text](https://imgur.com/emnQ35I.png)

**Designs for Fishing rods, Flint & steel, Shears and Brush**  
![Alt text](https://imgur.com/LjE1p9r.png)

**Especial Feature for Efficiency Enchant**  
As you wear out the tool, it rusts, if you repair it, it returns to its original shape.  
![Alt text](https://imgur.com/bysImk2.png)

</center>

**FREQUENT ISSUES**  
Other packets may interfere.  
The texture pack may not work with unofficial clients.

##### You can see previews or give me suggestions of my texture packs through [Twitter](https://twitter.com/milesdemillas_)
